OF THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION ON THE THIRD DAY IMMEDIATELY PRECEDING THE DATE SPECIFIED IN THE ORDER FOR THE HEARING, PER S.F. MUNICIPAL COURT
RULE 510F. THE ONE HUNDRED TWENTY DAY REQUIREMENT FOR PLT'S SERVICE OF AN ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS WAIVED. DEFT IS TO FILL OUT COMPLETELY THE
FINANCIAL STATEMENT, FILE IT AND SERVE IT ON PLTF BY NOT LATER THAN JUNE 23, 1997.
